SEARCH
Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type

Interface PrimitiveByteArrayValidator

All Superinterfaces:
ArrayPart<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator,Byte,byte[]>, ObjectPart<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator,byte[]>, Validator<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator>
public interface PrimitiveByteArrayValidator extends Validator<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator>, ObjectPart<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator,byte[]>, ArrayPart<PrimitiveByteArrayValidator,Byte,byte[]>
Validates the state of a byte[] value.

NOTE: Methods in this class throw or record exceptions under the conditions specified in their Javadoc. However, the actual exception type that is thrown or recorded may be different from what the Javadoc indicates, depending on the value of the ConfigurationUpdater.exceptionTransformer(Function) setting. This allows users to customize the exception handling behavior of the class.

    Method
    Description

  • Method Details

    • contains

      PrimitiveByteArrayValidator contains(byte expected)
      Ensures that the array contains an element.
      Parameters:
      expected - the element
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array does not contain expected

    • contains

      PrimitiveByteArrayValidator contains(byte expected, String name)
      Ensures that the array contains an element.
      Parameters:
      expected - the element
      name - the name of the element
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name contains leading or trailing whitespace, or is empty. If the array does not contain expected.

    • doesNotContain

      PrimitiveByteArrayValidator doesNotContain(byte unwanted)
      Ensures that the array does not contain unwanted.
      Parameters:
      unwanted - the unwanted element
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array contains unwanted

    • doesNotContain

      PrimitiveByteArrayValidator doesNotContain(byte unwanted, String name)
      Ensures that the array does not contain unwanted.
      Parameters:
      unwanted - the unwanted element
      name - the name of the unwanted element
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if name contains leading or trailing whitespace, or is empty. If the array contains unwanted.

    • isSorted

      PrimitiveByteArrayValidator isSorted()
      Ensures that the array is sorted by its natural ordering.
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value is null
      See Also:
      • Comparator.naturalOrder()

    • asBoxed

      ObjectArrayValidator<Byte,Byte[]> asBoxed()
      Returns a validator for the boxed representation of the value.
      Returns:
      a validator for the boxed representation of the value
